title: Implement evidence rule enforcement hook (Stop)
description: Implement a Stop hook that verifies agent output summaries contain required evidence (artifact paths, test results, confidence level) before allowing session end. Replaces instruction-based evidence requirements with shell-script validation.
acceptance_criteria: Given an agent session is ending, when the Stop hook fires, then it verifies artifact paths exist in the agent output summary
Given the summary is missing or has no artifact paths, when evaluated, then the hook blocks with guidance
Given evidence is present and valid (artifact paths, confidence, test results), when evaluated, then the hook allows session end
